_meta.description: Context manifest for the NFL BETTING product agent. Defines model, context loader steps, tool schemas, persistence, and display config.

contextLoader.label: current_picks
contextLoader.description: Load open picks and bets from localStorage
contextLoader.inject: Merge into a single array of open picks + bets. Label source (picks vs bankroll). Include: team, line, odds, bet_type, result, date_placed, amount_units.

contextLoader.label: bankroll_config
contextLoader.description: Load bankroll configuration for exposure checks
contextLoader.inject: Extract: unit_size, current_balance, max_daily_units, max_single_bet_units. If missing, use defaults: unit_size=25, max_daily_units=10, max_single_bet_units=3.

contextLoader.label: futures_portfolio
contextLoader.description: Load open futures positions and exposure
contextLoader.inject: Include: team, market, odds_at_entry, stake, current_odds_estimate, exposure. Use for hedge calculations.

contextLoader.label: today_context
contextLoader.description: Inject current date, NFL week, and active game count
contextLoader.inject: Today's date, current NFL week (derived from schedule), number of games today and this week.

tools.name: log_pick
tools.description: Record a new pick or bet to the Creator's tracker

notes.description: Rationale or context for the pick

book.description: Sportsbook where the bet is placed

tools.confirmation: Always confirm with Creator before executing. Never auto-log.

tools.name: get_odds
tools.description: Retrieve current odds from all 8 sportsbooks for a given game
tools.returns: [{ home, away, spread, total, ml_home, ml_away, book, last_updated }]
tools.rateNote: TheOddsAPI: 500 req/month free plan. Prefer Supabase cached data.

tools.name: get_line_movement
tools.description: Return opening vs. current line with directional movement
tools.returns: { game, open_spread, current_spread, open_total, current_total, direction, magnitude, sharp_flag }

tools.name: analyze_matchup
tools.description: Return model projections and intel summary for an NFL game
tools.returns: { home_proj, away_proj, predicted_margin, predicted_total, key_intel_bullets[], model_confidence }

tools.name: get_injury_report
tools.description: Return current injury designations for both teams

team_id.description: ESPN team ID or team abbreviation

tools.name: calculate_hedge
tools.description: Calculate hedge amounts for profit locking or loss cutting

tools.name: calculate_teaser
tools.description: Evaluate teaser value — checks key number crossings (3, 7) and Wong qualification
